# Implementation Report: Governance Service + Headless Router Routes
Generated: 2026-02-20T05:28:47Z

## Task
Create governance-service.ts and add governance routes to headless-router.ts for headless mode support.

## Changes Made

### 1. Created `/Users/emanuelesabetta/ai-maestro/services/governance-service.ts`

- Uses ServiceResult<T> pattern consistent with teams-service.ts
- Includes rate limiting, password verification, transfer resolution with team file locking, agent notification

### 2. Modified `/Users/emanuelesabetta/ai-maestro/services/headless-router.ts`
- Added governance-service import block (lines 222-230)
- Added 7 governance route entries (lines 1104-1135): GET /api/governance, POST /api/governance/manager, POST /api/governance/password, GET /api/governance/reachable, POST /api/governance/transfers/[id]/resolve, GET /api/governance/transfers, POST /api/governance/transfers
- Transfer resolve route placed before plain /transfers routes (more specific first)
- Updated 9 teams route handlers to pass X-Agent-Id header as requestingAgentId: PUT tasks/[taskId], DELETE tasks/[taskId], GET tasks, POST tasks, GET documents, POST documents, GET teams/[id], PUT teams/[id], DELETE teams/[id], POST teams
